summary: Audience recording delivers a full, real sound (though guitars sit low) and the show shines with an uptempo Dark Star jam after Saint.
review: The audience‑sourced tape is praised for its spacious, “real” feel and a mix that puts Phil’s bass up front, even if the three guitars are buried. Musically the highlight is a brief, high‑energy Dark Star‑style improvisation following Saint, with TLMD noted as solid. Overall reviewers find it enjoyable despite some mix quirks.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate 3‑4 stars and comment positively on the recording’s presence and a standout Dark Star jam; limited detail on the full set keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Mix has guitars unusually low, board described as tinny, but AUD feels full, real and places Phil’s bass up front; overall listenable and often preferred to the board version.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers mention a notable post‑Saint improvisation and generally enjoy the performance, though they give little detail on overall pacing.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Guitar work is present but buried in the mix; he exits early during the Dark Star jam.
band_member_comments.Phil: Bass is prominently mixed up front, which reviewers appreciate.
band_member_comments.Bob: Continues the jam after Jerry leaves, contributing to the uptempo Dark Star section.
